title: pavonia repens
intro: Pavonia repens, also known as the spreading rose-mallow or spreading rock rose, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Pavonia repens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Pavonia repens is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
